ddls:
CREATE TABLE "syntax_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each syntax element type */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the syntax element (e.g., add-expression) */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of syntax element (e.g., expression, argument, list) */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total occurrences of this syntax element in code submissions */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion success rate of this syntax element */,
  "language_support" TEXT /* Programming languages that support this syntax element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the syntax element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "syntax_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue record */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the syntax element with the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., Error, Warning, Info) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of instances of this issue type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message associated with the issue */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Suggested fix for the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_syntax_issues_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES syntax_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_hours" (
  "error_hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error hour record */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the syntax element associated with the error hours */,
  "hours" REAL /* Total hours spent addressing errors for this element */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error occurred */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the error (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_hours_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES syntax_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warning_hours" (
  "warning_hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning hour record */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the syntax element associated with the warning hours */,
  "hours" REAL /* Total hours spent addressing warnings for this element */,
  "warning_date" TEXT /* Date when the warning occurred */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the warning (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warning_hours_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES syntax_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the syntax element accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report accessed (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES syntax_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the code */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code submitted by the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the code */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "syntax_element_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the syntax element associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_syntax_element_tags_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES syntax_elements ("element_id")
)
